creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
I don't see real reason to rename this port, it carries no benefits and
comes only with drawbacks (would need adding MOVED record etc).
Leftover files come from installed python3 port on your system, this
port displays what plugins it will build at the end of the
make configure, in this case :

[..]
-- Third Party Interfaces:
--  - with Python2 interface:         yes
--  - with Python3 interface:         yes
[..]

Here also portlint points few things that need to be fixed.
